---
title: "Posterior SBC experiments"
author: "Prenom:Kyuhan, nom:Kim"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::downcute:
    self_contained: yes
    thumbnails: false
    lightbox: true
    gallery: false
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: hide
    fig_width: 10
    fig_height: 8
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

#setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))

knitr::opts_chunk$set(dev = "png",
                      dpi = 160,
                      echo = F,
                      cache = F,
                      warning = F,
                      message = F, 
                      fig.path='Figures/'
                      )

library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(reshape2)
library(GGally)
library(SBC)
library(bayesplot)
library(purrr)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
library(ggridges)

theme_set(theme_cowplot())

source('../data/Albacore_Data.R')
source('../utils/pipeline_utils.R')
source('../utils/simulation.R')
source('../utils/sbc_utils.R')
source('../utils/helpers.R')

files <- list.files("../results", pattern = "^sbc_.*\\.(rds|RData)$", full.names = TRUE)
manifest_file <- "../results/results_manifest.rds"

all_results <- list()
all_fits <- list()
all_pars <- list()
all_SBCmodel <- list()
all_nsamples <- list()
all_nchains <- list()

if (file.exists(manifest_file)) {
  manifest <- readRDS(manifest_file)
  
  for (name in names(manifest)) {
    entry <- manifest[[name]]
    all_results[[name]] <- entry$results
    all_fits[[name]] <- NULL
    all_pars[[name]] <- NULL
    all_SBCmodel[[name]] <- entry$metadata$SBCmodel
    all_nsamples[[name]] <- entry$metadata$nsample
    all_nchains[[name]] <- entry$metadata$nchains
  }
} else {
  for (f in files) {
    entry <- read_sbc_result_file(f)
    name <- entry$name
    all_results[[name]] <- entry$results
    all_fits[[name]] <- NULL
    all_pars[[name]] <- NULL
    all_SBCmodel[[name]] <- entry$metadata$SBCmodel
    all_nsamples[[name]] <- entry$metadata$nsample
    all_nchains[[name]] <- entry$metadata$nchains
  }
}

result_names <- names(all_results)

if (length(result_names) > 0) {
  run_prefix <- ifelse(grepl("^sbc_", result_names), "sbc_", "legacy")
  sbc_groups <- split(result_names, run_prefix)

  parse_sbc_stem <- function(x) {
    m <- stringr::str_match(x, "^(?:sbc_|\\w*SBC(?:dep)?_)?(.+?)\\.stan_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_.+$")
    data.frame(
      run_id = x,
      model_key = ifelse(is.na(m[, 2]), x, m[, 2]),
      adapt_key = ifelse(is.na(m[, 3]), NA_character_, m[, 3]),
      cv_key = ifelse(is.na(m[, 4]), NA_character_, m[, 4]),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  adapt_groups <- lapply(sbc_groups, function(x) {
    parsed <- parse_sbc_stem(x)
    split(parsed$run_id, parsed$adapt_key)
  })

  model_groups <- lapply(sbc_groups, function(x) {
    parsed <- parse_sbc_stem(x)
    split(parsed$run_id, parsed$model_key)
  })
} else {
  sbc_groups <- list()
  adapt_groups <- list()
  model_groups <- list()
}

has_sbc_results <- length(all_results) > 0
legacy_sbc_plots_enabled <- tolower(Sys.getenv("ENABLE_LEGACY_SBC_PLOTS", "false")) %in% c("1", "true", "yes", "y")

require_sbc_diag_column <- function(result, result_name, table_name, column_name) {
  diag_tbl <- result[[table_name]]
  if (is.null(diag_tbl)) {
    stop(sprintf(
      "Missing SBC diagnostics table '%s' for result '%s'. Re-run SBC and collect results.",
      table_name, result_name
    ))
  }
  if (!column_name %in% names(diag_tbl)) {
    stop(sprintf(
      "Missing SBC diagnostics column '%s' in '%s' for result '%s'. Available columns: %s",
      column_name, table_name, result_name, paste(names(diag_tbl), collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }
  diag_tbl[[column_name]]
}

validate_sbc_diagnostics <- function(all_results) {
  if (length(all_results) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  invisible(imap(all_results, function(result, result_name) {
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "backend_diagnostics", "n_divergent")
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "backend_diagnostics", "n_max_treedepth")
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "backend_diagnostics", "max_chain_time")
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "default_diagnostics", "min_ess_bulk")
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "default_diagnostics", "max_rhat")
    TRUE
  }))
}

subset_sbc_result_by_sim <- function(result, keep_sim_ids) {
  keep_sim_ids <- sort(unique(as.integer(keep_sim_ids)))
  if (length(keep_sim_ids) == 0) return(NULL)
  out <- result
  if (!is.null(out$stats) && "sim_id" %in% names(out$stats)) {
    out$stats <- dplyr::filter(out$stats, sim_id %in% keep_sim_ids)
  }
  if (!is.null(out$backend_diagnostics) && "sim_id" %in% names(out$backend_diagnostics)) {
    out$backend_diagnostics <- dplyr::filter(out$backend_diagnostics, sim_id %in% keep_sim_ids)
  }
  if (!is.null(out$default_diagnostics) && "sim_id" %in% names(out$default_diagnostics)) {
    out$default_diagnostics <- dplyr::filter(out$default_diagnostics, sim_id %in% keep_sim_ids)
  }
  if (!is.null(out$fits) && length(out$fits) >= max(keep_sim_ids, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    out$fits <- out$fits[keep_sim_ids]
  }
  out
}

if (has_sbc_results) {
  validate_sbc_diagnostics(all_results)
}

list_plot_rds <- function(dir_path, pattern) {
  if (!dir.exists(dir_path)) return(character())
  files <- list.files(dir_path, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(files) == 0) return(character())
  info <- file.info(files)
  files[order(info$mtime, decreasing = TRUE)]
}

prior_only_rds_files <- list_plot_rds("../results/prior_only", "^prior_only_plot_data_.*\\.rds$")
albacore_rds_files <- list_plot_rds("../results/albacore_fits", "^albacore_fits_plot_data_.*\\.rds$")

manuscript_fig_dir <- "../figures_generated"
dir.create(manuscript_fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

save_manuscript_plot <- function(plot_obj, filename, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300) {
  if (is.null(plot_obj)) return(invisible(NULL))
  if (inherits(plot_obj, "ggplot")) {
    # Manuscript figures should carry interpretation in captions, not in-panel titles.
    plot_obj <- plot_obj +
      labs(title = NULL, subtitle = NULL) +
      theme(plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank())
  }
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(manuscript_fig_dir, filename),
    plot = plot_obj,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    dpi = dpi,
    limitsize = FALSE
  )
  invisible(plot_obj)
}

save_plot_grid <- function(plot_list, filename, ncol = 1, width = 12, height = 8, labels = NULL) {
  plot_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), plot_list)
  if (length(plot_list) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = ncol, labels = labels)
  save_manuscript_plot(p, filename, width = width, height = height)
  invisible(p)
}

panel_slug <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_\\.-]+", "", x)
  tolower(x)
}

save_plot_list_panels <- function(plot_list, prefix, width = 10, height = 8) {
  if (length(plot_list) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  nm <- names(plot_list)
  if (is.null(nm)) nm <- seq_along(plot_list)
  for (i in seq_along(plot_list)) {
    p <- plot_list[[i]]
    if (is.null(p)) next
    file_nm <- sprintf("%s__%s.png", prefix, panel_slug(nm[[i]]))
    save_manuscript_plot(p, file_nm, width = width, height = height)
  }
  invisible(NULL)
}

save_named_plot <- function(plot_obj, prefix, name, width = 10, height = 8) {
  if (is.null(plot_obj)) return(invisible(NULL))
  save_manuscript_plot(
    plot_obj,
    sprintf("%s__%s.png", prefix, panel_slug(name)),
    width = width,
    height = height
  )
  invisible(NULL)
}

save_sbc_perf_panel_plots <- function(
    plot_data,
    x_col,
    prefix,
    x_label,
    x_scale = NULL,
    x_vline = NULL,
    bins = 25,
    palette = "Dark2",
    angle_x = FALSE) {
  groups <- levels(plot_data$model_group)
  groups <- groups[groups %in% unique(as.character(plot_data$model_group))]
  cv_vals <- unique(as.character(plot_data$cv_group))
  cv_vals <- cv_vals[!is.na(cv_vals)]
  for (grp in groups) {
    for (cv in cv_vals) {
      dd <- dplyr::filter(plot_data, model_group == grp, as.character(cv_group) == cv)
      if (nrow(dd) == 0) next
      p <- ggplot(dd, aes(x = .data[[x_col]])) +
        geom_histogram(bins = bins, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
        labs(x = x_label, y = "Frequency") +
        paper_theme() +
        theme(
          legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_blank(),
          strip.background = element_blank(),
          strip.text = element_blank()
        )
      if (!is.null(x_scale)) p <- p + x_scale
      if (!is.null(x_vline)) p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = x_vline, linetype = "dashed")
      if (isTRUE(angle_x)) p <- p + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
      save_manuscript_plot(
        p,
        sprintf("%s__%s__cv_%s.png", prefix, panel_slug(grp), panel_slug(cv)),
        width = 7,
        height = 4.5
      )
    }
  }
  invisible(NULL)
}

grid_layout_dims <- function(n_panels, panel_w = 6.0, panel_h = 4.0, max_cols = 2, max_h = 14) {
  if (n_panels <= 0) {
    return(list(ncol = 1L, width = 12, height = 8))
  }
  ncol <- min(max_cols, n_panels)
  nrow <- ceiling(n_panels / ncol)
  width <- panel_w * ncol
  height <- min(max_h, max(4, panel_h * nrow))
  list(ncol = ncol, width = width, height = height)
}

paper_theme <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.3),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.3),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title.position = "plot"
    )
}

saved_param_order <- c(
  "K", "r", "q", "sigma2", "tau2", "MSY",
  "Pt[23]", "BtoverBmsy[23]", "HtoverHmsy[23]",
  "loglik"
)

ordered_param_levels <- function(x, priority = saved_param_order) {
  x <- unique(as.character(x))
  out <- c(intersect(priority, x), setdiff(x, priority))
  if ("loglik" %in% out) {
    out <- c(setdiff(out, "loglik"), "loglik")
  }
  out
}

param_label_parse <- function(x) {
  vapply(x, format_parameter_label_plotmath, character(1))
}

pretty_sbc_label <- function(x) {
  out <- vapply(x, format_sbc_run_label, character(1))
  gsub("_", " ", out, fixed = TRUE)
}

retheme_rank_plot <- function(p, run_label = NULL) {
  if (!inherits(p, "ggplot")) return(p)
  if ("variable" %in% names(p$data)) {
    raw_vars <- as.character(p$data$variable)
    var_levels <- ordered_param_levels(raw_vars)
    label_levels <- param_label_parse(var_levels)
    p$data$variable <- factor(
      param_label_parse(raw_vars),
      levels = unique(label_levels)
    )
  }
  p +
    facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 5, labeller = label_parsed) +
    labs(title = run_label) +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
      plot.margin = margin(4, 4, 4, 4)
    )
}

add_sbc_model_label <- function(df, model_col = "model_name") {
  raw_vals <- as.character(df[[model_col]])
  pretty_vals <- pretty_sbc_label(raw_vals)
  df$model_label <- factor(pretty_vals, levels = unique(pretty_vals))
  df
}

add_sbc_model_cv_groups <- function(df, model_col = "model_name") {
  raw_vals <- as.character(df[[model_col]])
  compact_labels <- vapply(raw_vals, format_sbc_run_label, character(1))
  m <- stringr::str_match(compact_labels, "^(.*)_(cv[^_]+|no)$")
  model_group <- ifelse(is.na(m[, 2]), compact_labels, m[, 2])
  cv_group <- ifelse(is.na(m[, 3]), "unknown", m[, 3])

  cv_levels <- c("no", "cv0.1", "cv0.3", "cv0.5", sort(unique(cv_group)))
  cv_levels <- unique(cv_levels)
  cv_levels <- cv_levels[cv_levels %in% unique(cv_group)]

  model_group_pretty <- gsub("_", " ", model_group, fixed = TRUE)
  mm <- stringr::str_match(model_group_pretty, "^(ct|nct)\\s+(.+)$")
  family_vals <- ifelse(is.na(mm[, 3]), model_group_pretty, mm[, 3])
  family_priority <- c("fmax", "if", "soft", "soft2")
  family_levels <- c(
    intersect(family_priority, unique(family_vals)),
    setdiff(unique(family_vals), family_priority)
  )
  model_levels_ct <- character(0)
  model_levels_nct <- character(0)
  for (fam in family_levels) {
    ct_label <- paste("ct", fam)
    nct_label <- paste("nct", fam)
    if (ct_label %in% model_group_pretty) model_levels_ct <- c(model_levels_ct, ct_label)
    if (nct_label %in% model_group_pretty) model_levels_nct <- c(model_levels_nct, nct_label)
  }
  model_levels <- c(model_levels_ct, model_levels_nct)
  model_levels <- unique(c(model_levels, unique(model_group_pretty)))

  df$model_group <- factor(model_group_pretty, levels = model_levels)
  df$cv_group <- factor(cv_group, levels = cv_levels)
  df
}

```


<!-- # fit draws -->

<!-- ``` -->

# rank statistics

```{r sbc_rank_statistics, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping SBC rank plots.\n")
} else {
  rank_plots <- imap(all_results, function(res, nm) {
    retheme_rank_plot(
      plot_rank_hist(res),
      run_label = gsub("_", " ", format_sbc_run_label(nm), fixed = TRUE)
    )
  })
  invisible(lapply(rank_plots, print))
  rank_dims <- grid_layout_dims(length(rank_plots), panel_w = 6.2, panel_h = 3.8, max_cols = 2, max_h = 14)
  save_plot_grid(
    rank_plots,
    filename = "sbc_rank_histograms.png",
    ncol = rank_dims$ncol,
    width = rank_dims$width,
    height = rank_dims$height
  )
  save_plot_list_panels(rank_plots, "sbc_rank_histograms_panel", width = 8, height = 5.5)

}

```

# ecdf difference

```{r sbc_ecdf_difference_overlay, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping ECDF plots.\n")
} else {
  ecdf_nested <- lapply(model_groups, function(sbc_type) {
    lapply(sbc_type, function(model_subset) {
      plot_ecdf_diff_overlay(all_results[model_subset])
    })
  })
  ecdf_plots <- unlist(ecdf_nested, recursive = FALSE)
  invisible(lapply(ecdf_plots, print))

  ecdf_run_ids <- names(ecdf_plots)
  if (is.null(ecdf_run_ids)) ecdf_run_ids <- rep("", length(ecdf_plots))
  ecdf_labels <- vapply(ecdf_run_ids, format_sbc_run_label, character(1))
  is_ct_plot <- grepl("^ct_", ecdf_labels)
  is_nct_plot <- grepl("^nct_", ecdf_labels)

  ecdf_dims <- grid_layout_dims(length(ecdf_plots), panel_w = 7.0, panel_h = 5.2, max_cols = 2, max_h = 16)
  save_plot_grid(
    ecdf_plots,
    filename = "sbc_ecdf_diff_overlay.png",
    ncol = ecdf_dims$ncol,
    width = ecdf_dims$width,
    height = ecdf_dims$height
  )
  save_plot_list_panels(ecdf_plots, "sbc_ecdf_diff_overlay_panel", width = 8, height = 5.5)

  if (any(is_ct_plot)) {
    ct_ecdf_plots <- ecdf_plots[is_ct_plot]
    ct_dims <- grid_layout_dims(length(ct_ecdf_plots), panel_w = 7.0, panel_h = 5.2, max_cols = 2, max_h = 14)
    save_plot_grid(
      ct_ecdf_plots,
      filename = "sbc_ecdf_diff_overlay_ct.png",
      ncol = ct_dims$ncol,
      width = ct_dims$width,
      height = ct_dims$height
    )
  }

  if (any(is_nct_plot)) {
    nct_ecdf_plots <- ecdf_plots[is_nct_plot]
    nct_dims <- grid_layout_dims(length(nct_ecdf_plots), panel_w = 7.0, panel_h = 5.2, max_cols = 2, max_h = 14)
    save_plot_grid(
      nct_ecdf_plots,
      filename = "sbc_ecdf_diff_overlay_nct.png",
      ncol = nct_dims$ncol,
      width = nct_dims$width,
      height = nct_dims$height
    )
  }
}

```

# ecdf difference by divergence subset

```{r sbc_ecdf_difference_by_divergence, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping ECDF-by-divergence plots.\n")
} else {
  min_subset_size <- 20
  set.seed(123)
  ecdf_div_plots <- imap(all_results, function(res, nm) {
    backend <- res$backend_diagnostics
    if (is.null(backend) || !"sim_id" %in% names(backend) || !"n_divergent" %in% names(backend)) {
      return(NULL)
    }
    sim_no_div <- backend$sim_id[backend$n_divergent == 0]
    sim_has_div <- backend$sim_id[backend$n_divergent > 0]
    sim_no_div <- sim_no_div[!is.na(sim_no_div)]
    sim_has_div <- sim_has_div[!is.na(sim_has_div)]
    if (length(sim_no_div) < min_subset_size || length(sim_has_div) < min_subset_size) {
      return(NULL)
    }
    n_bal <- min(length(sim_no_div), length(sim_has_div))
    sim_no_div_bal <- if (length(sim_no_div) > n_bal) sample(sim_no_div, n_bal) else sim_no_div
    sim_has_div_bal <- if (length(sim_has_div) > n_bal) sample(sim_has_div, n_bal) else sim_has_div
    sub_no_div <- subset_sbc_result_by_sim(res, sim_no_div_bal)
    sub_has_div <- subset_sbc_result_by_sim(res, sim_has_div_bal)
    if (is.null(sub_no_div) || is.null(sub_has_div)) return(NULL)
    p <- plot_ecdf_diff_overlay(
      list(
        no_divergence = sub_no_div,
        has_divergence = sub_has_div
      )
    ) +
      labs(
        title = paste0(
          gsub("_", " ", format_sbc_run_label(nm), fixed = TRUE),
          " (balanced n=", n_bal, " each; raw n0=", length(sim_no_div),
          ", raw n>0=", length(sim_has_div), ")"
        )
      )
    p
  })
  ecdf_div_plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), ecdf_div_plots)
  if (length(ecdf_div_plots) == 0) {
    cat("No models had both divergence subsets with at least ", min_subset_size, " simulations.\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    invisible(lapply(ecdf_div_plots, print))
    div_dims <- grid_layout_dims(length(ecdf_div_plots), panel_w = 7.0, panel_h = 5.2, max_cols = 2, max_h = 16)
    save_plot_grid(
      ecdf_div_plots,
      filename = "sbc_ecdf_diff_by_divergence.png",
      ncol = div_dims$ncol,
      width = div_dims$width,
      height = div_dims$height
    )
    save_plot_list_panels(ecdf_div_plots, "sbc_ecdf_diff_by_divergence_panel", width = 8, height = 5.5)
  }
}
```


# divergent transitions

```{r sbc_divergent_transition_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping divergent transition plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    n_divergent <- require_sbc_diag_column(
      result, model_name, "backend_diagnostics", "n_divergent"
    )
    n_sample <- all_nsamples[[model_name]]
    
    data.frame(
      n_divergent = n_divergent,
      percentage = (n_divergent / n_sample) * 100,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  div_fit_rate <- plot_data %>%
    group_by(cv_group, model_group) %>%
    summarise(
      pct_any_div = 100 * mean(n_divergent > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      label = paste0("Any div: ", sprintf("%.1f%%", pct_any_div)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  p_div_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percentage)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y") +
    geom_text(
      data = div_fit_rate,
      aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = label),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      hjust = 1.05,
      vjust = 1.1,
      size = 2.8
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)) +
    labs(
      title = "Divergent transition rate across SBC fits",
      x = "Divergent transitions (% of post-warmup draws)",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
  print(p_div_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_div_hist, "sbc_divergence_histograms.png", width = 12, height = 8)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "percentage",
    prefix = "sbc_divergence_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "Divergent transitions (% of post-warmup draws)",
    x_scale = scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)),
    angle_x = TRUE
  )
}

```




# effective sample size

```{r sbc_effective_sample_size_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping ESS plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    min_ess_bulk <- require_sbc_diag_column(
      result, model_name, "default_diagnostics", "min_ess_bulk"
    )
    nchains <- all_nchains[[model_name]]
    
    data.frame(
      min_ess_bulk = min_ess_bulk,
      percentage = (min_ess_bulk / (nchains*100) ) * 100,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  p_ess_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percentage)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)) +
    labs(
      title = "Minimum bulk ESS threshold performance across SBC fits",
      x = "min bulk ESS as % of (100 × nchains)",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
  print(p_ess_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_ess_hist, "sbc_ess_histograms.png", width = 12, height = 8)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "percentage",
    prefix = "sbc_ess_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "min bulk ESS as % of (100 × nchains)",
    x_scale = scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)),
    x_vline = 100,
    angle_x = TRUE
  )
}

```



# treedepth saturation

```{r sbc_treedepth_saturation_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping treedepth saturation plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    n_max_treedepth <- require_sbc_diag_column(
      result, model_name, "backend_diagnostics", "n_max_treedepth"
    )
    n_sample <- all_nsamples[[model_name]]

    data.frame(
      n_max_treedepth = n_max_treedepth,
      percentage = (n_max_treedepth / n_sample) * 100,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  p_treedepth_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percentage)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)) +
    labs(
      title = "Max treedepth saturation across SBC fits",
      x = "Transitions hitting max treedepth (% of post-warmup draws)",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
  print(p_treedepth_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_treedepth_hist, "sbc_treedepth_histograms.png", width = 12, height = 8)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "percentage",
    prefix = "sbc_treedepth_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "Transitions hitting max treedepth (% of post-warmup draws)",
    x_scale = scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)),
    angle_x = TRUE
  )
}
```




# Rhat

```{r sbc_rhat_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping R-hat plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    max_rhat <- require_sbc_diag_column(
      result, model_name, "default_diagnostics", "max_rhat"
    )
    
    data.frame(
      max_rhat = max_rhat,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  p_rhat_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = max_rhat)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 1.01, linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(
      title = "Maximum R-hat across SBC fits",
      x = "Maximum R-hat",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme()
  print(p_rhat_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_rhat_hist, "sbc_rhat_histograms.png", width = 12, height = 8)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "max_rhat",
    prefix = "sbc_rhat_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "Maximum R-hat",
    x_vline = 1.01
  )
}


```

# max_chain_time

```{r sbc_chain_time_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping chain time plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    max_chain_time <- require_sbc_diag_column(
      result, model_name, "backend_diagnostics", "max_chain_time"
    )
    
    data.frame(
      max_chain_time = max_chain_time,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  p_chain_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = max_chain_time)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(
      title = "Maximum chain runtime across SBC fits",
      x = "Time (seconds)",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme()
  print(p_chain_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_chain_hist, "sbc_chain_time_histograms.png", width = 12, height = 8)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "max_chain_time",
    prefix = "sbc_chain_time_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "Time (seconds)"
  )
}


```




# Simulated values by treedepth-saturation group

```{r sim_values_by_treedepth_group, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping treedepth subset plots.\n")
} else {
  pretty_by_run <- vapply(names(all_results), format_sbc_run_label, character(1))
  model_key_by_run <- sub("_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "", pretty_by_run)
  cv_key_by_run <- sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", pretty_by_run)
  unique_models <- unique(model_key_by_run)
  ct_models <- sort(unique(unique_models[grepl("^ct_", unique_models)]))
  nct_models <- sort(unique(unique_models[grepl("^nct_", unique_models)]))
  model_order <- c(ct_models, nct_models, setdiff(unique_models, c(ct_models, nct_models)))
  cv_order <- c("cv0.1", "cv0.3", "cv0.5")

  target_vars <- c("K", "r", "q", "sigma2", "tau2", "Pt[23]")
  td_subset_plots <- list()

  for (mdl in model_order) {
    run_names <- names(all_results)[model_key_by_run == mdl]
    run_names <- run_names[cv_key_by_run[match(run_names, names(all_results))] != "no"]
    run_names <- run_names[order(match(cv_key_by_run[match(run_names, names(all_results))], cv_order), run_names)]
    overall_truth_all <- bind_rows(lapply(run_names, function(selected_name) {
      res <- all_results[[selected_name]]
      stats_df <- res$stats
      if (is.null(stats_df) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "variable", "simulated_value") %in% names(stats_df))) {
        return(NULL)
      }
      stats_df %>%
        filter(variable %in% target_vars) %>%
        group_by(sim_id, variable) %>%
        summarise(value = first(simulated_value), .groups = "drop") %>%
        mutate(
          value = ifelse(variable == "q", log(pmax(value, .Machine$double.eps)), value),
          cv_group = sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", format_sbc_run_label(selected_name)),
          cv_label = cv_group
        )
    }))
    sim_vals_all <- bind_rows(lapply(run_names, function(selected_name) {
      res <- all_results[[selected_name]]
      backend <- res$backend_diagnostics
      stats_df <- res$stats
      if (is.null(backend) || is.null(stats_df) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "n_max_treedepth") %in% names(backend)) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "variable", "simulated_value") %in% names(stats_df))) {
        return(NULL)
      }

      n_sample <- all_nsamples[[selected_name]]
      if (is.null(n_sample) || !is.finite(n_sample) || n_sample <= 0) n_sample <- 1
      td_pct <- (backend$n_max_treedepth / n_sample) * 100
      sim_low <- sort(unique(backend$sim_id[td_pct < 10]))
      sim_high <- sort(unique(backend$sim_id[td_pct >= 90]))
      sim_low <- sim_low[!is.na(sim_low)]
      sim_high <- sim_high[!is.na(sim_high)]
      if (length(sim_low) == 0 || length(sim_high) == 0) return(NULL)

      stats_df %>%
        filter(variable %in% target_vars, sim_id %in% c(sim_low, sim_high)) %>%
        mutate(
          value = ifelse(variable == "q", log(pmax(simulated_value, .Machine$double.eps)), simulated_value),
          td_group = case_when(
            sim_id %in% sim_low ~ "low_td(<10%)",
            sim_id %in% sim_high ~ "high_td(>=90%)",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
          ),
          cv_group = sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", format_sbc_run_label(selected_name)),
          cv_label = cv_group
        ) %>%
        filter(!is.na(td_group)) %>%
        group_by(sim_id, variable, td_group, cv_group, cv_label) %>%
        summarise(value = first(value), .groups = "drop")
    }))
    if (is.null(sim_vals_all) || nrow(sim_vals_all) == 0) next

    cv_labels_present <- unique(sim_vals_all[, c("cv_group", "cv_label")])
    cv_labels_present <- cv_labels_present[order(match(cv_labels_present$cv_group, cv_order), cv_labels_present$cv_group), ]
    cv_label_map <- setNames(as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_label), as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_group))

    sim_vals_all <- sim_vals_all %>%
      mutate(
        td_group = factor(td_group, levels = c("low_td(<10%)", "high_td(>=90%)")),
        cv_label = factor(cv_label, levels = cv_labels_present$cv_label),
        variable_label = factor(
          ifelse(
            variable == "Pt[23]",
            "P[1989]",
            ifelse(variable == "q", "log(q)", param_label_parse(variable))
          ),
          levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]")
        )
      )
    overall_truth_all <- overall_truth_all %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(cv_label_map[as.character(cv_label)], levels = cv_labels_present$cv_label),
        variable_label = factor(
          ifelse(
            variable == "Pt[23]",
            "P[1989]",
            ifelse(variable == "q", "log(q)", param_label_parse(variable))
          ),
          levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]")
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(cv_label), !is.na(variable_label))
    td_counts <- sim_vals_all %>%
      distinct(sim_id, td_group, cv_label) %>%
      count(cv_label, td_group) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = td_group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
      mutate(
        `low_td(<10%)` = if ("low_td(<10%)" %in% names(.)) `low_td(<10%)` else 0L,
        `high_td(>=90%)` = if ("high_td(>=90%)" %in% names(.)) `high_td(>=90%)` else 0L
      )

    valid_cv_labels <- td_counts %>%
      filter(`low_td(<10%)` > 0, `high_td(>=90%)` > 0) %>%
      pull(cv_label) %>%
      as.character() %>%
      unique()
    if (length(valid_cv_labels) == 0) next

    sim_vals_all <- sim_vals_all %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels),
        variable_label = factor(as.character(variable_label), levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]"))
      )
    overall_truth_all <- overall_truth_all %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels),
        variable_label = factor(as.character(variable_label), levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]"))
      )
    td_counts <- td_counts %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels))

    p_td_subset <- ggplot(sim_vals_all, aes(x = value, y = after_stat(ndensity), fill = td_group)) +
      geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.55, bins = 35) +
      geom_density(
        data = overall_truth_all,
        aes(x = value, y = after_stat(scaled), group = interaction(cv_label, variable_label)),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        colour = "black",
        linewidth = 0.4,
        adjust = 1.1
      ) +
      facet_grid(
        cv_label ~ variable_label,
        scales = "free",
        labeller = labeller(variable_label = label_parsed, cv_label = label_value)
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("low_td(<10%)" = "#1f78b4", "high_td(>=90%)" = "#e31a1c"),
        name = "Treedepth group"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = gsub("_", " ", mdl, fixed = TRUE),
        x = "Simulated value",
        y = "Scaled density"
      ) +
      paper_theme()

    td_subset_plots[[mdl]] <- p_td_subset
  }

  if (length(td_subset_plots) == 0) {
    cat("No models had both subsets: <10% and >=90% treedepth saturation.\n")
  } else {
    invisible(lapply(td_subset_plots, print))
    td_dims <- grid_layout_dims(length(td_subset_plots), panel_w = 7.0, panel_h = 5.0, max_cols = 2, max_h = 20)
    save_plot_grid(
      td_subset_plots,
      filename = "sim_values_by_treedepth_subset.png",
      ncol = td_dims$ncol,
      width = td_dims$width,
      height = td_dims$height
    )
    save_plot_list_panels(td_subset_plots, "sim_values_by_treedepth_subset_panel", width = 9, height = 6.5)
  }
}
```


# Simulated values by divergence group

```{r sim_values_by_divergence_group, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping divergence subset plots.\n")
} else {
  pretty_by_run <- vapply(names(all_results), format_sbc_run_label, character(1))
  model_key_by_run <- sub("_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "", pretty_by_run)
  cv_key_by_run <- sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", pretty_by_run)
  unique_models <- unique(model_key_by_run)
  ct_models <- sort(unique(unique_models[grepl("^ct_", unique_models)]))
  nct_models <- sort(unique(unique_models[grepl("^nct_", unique_models)]))
  model_order <- c(ct_models, nct_models, setdiff(unique_models, c(ct_models, nct_models)))
  cv_order <- c("cv0.1", "cv0.3", "cv0.5")

  target_vars <- c("K", "r", "q", "sigma2", "tau2", "Pt[23]")
  div_subset_plots <- list()

  for (mdl in model_order) {
    run_names <- names(all_results)[model_key_by_run == mdl]
    run_names <- run_names[cv_key_by_run[match(run_names, names(all_results))] != "no"]
    run_names <- run_names[order(match(cv_key_by_run[match(run_names, names(all_results))], cv_order), run_names)]
    overall_truth_all <- bind_rows(lapply(run_names, function(selected_name) {
      res <- all_results[[selected_name]]
      stats_df <- res$stats
      if (is.null(stats_df) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "variable", "simulated_value") %in% names(stats_df))) {
        return(NULL)
      }
      stats_df %>%
        filter(variable %in% target_vars) %>%
        group_by(sim_id, variable) %>%
        summarise(value = first(simulated_value), .groups = "drop") %>%
        mutate(
          value = ifelse(variable == "q", log(pmax(value, .Machine$double.eps)), value),
          cv_group = sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", format_sbc_run_label(selected_name)),
          cv_label = cv_group
        )
    }))
    sim_vals_all <- bind_rows(lapply(run_names, function(selected_name) {
      res <- all_results[[selected_name]]
      backend <- res$backend_diagnostics
      stats_df <- res$stats
      if (is.null(backend) || is.null(stats_df) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "n_divergent") %in% names(backend)) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "variable", "simulated_value") %in% names(stats_df))) {
        return(NULL)
      }

      sim_no_div <- sort(unique(backend$sim_id[backend$n_divergent == 0]))
      sim_has_div <- sort(unique(backend$sim_id[backend$n_divergent > 0]))
      sim_no_div <- sim_no_div[!is.na(sim_no_div)]
      sim_has_div <- sim_has_div[!is.na(sim_has_div)]
      if (length(sim_no_div) == 0 || length(sim_has_div) == 0) return(NULL)

      stats_df %>%
        filter(variable %in% target_vars, sim_id %in% c(sim_no_div, sim_has_div)) %>%
        mutate(
          value = ifelse(variable == "q", log(pmax(simulated_value, .Machine$double.eps)), simulated_value),
          div_group = case_when(
            sim_id %in% sim_no_div ~ "no_div(=0)",
            sim_id %in% sim_has_div ~ "has_div(>0)",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
          ),
          cv_group = sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", format_sbc_run_label(selected_name)),
          cv_label = cv_group
        ) %>%
        filter(!is.na(div_group)) %>%
        group_by(sim_id, variable, div_group, cv_group, cv_label) %>%
        summarise(value = first(value), .groups = "drop")
    }))
    if (is.null(sim_vals_all) || nrow(sim_vals_all) == 0) next

    cv_labels_present <- unique(sim_vals_all[, c("cv_group", "cv_label")])
    cv_labels_present <- cv_labels_present[order(match(cv_labels_present$cv_group, cv_order), cv_labels_present$cv_group), ]
    cv_label_map <- setNames(as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_label), as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_group))

    sim_vals_all <- sim_vals_all %>%
      mutate(
        div_group = factor(div_group, levels = c("no_div(=0)", "has_div(>0)")),
        cv_label = factor(cv_label, levels = cv_labels_present$cv_label),
        variable_label = factor(
          ifelse(
            variable == "Pt[23]",
            "P[1989]",
            ifelse(variable == "q", "log(q)", param_label_parse(variable))
          ),
          levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]")
        )
      )
    overall_truth_all <- overall_truth_all %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(cv_label_map[as.character(cv_label)], levels = cv_labels_present$cv_label),
        variable_label = factor(
          ifelse(
            variable == "Pt[23]",
            "P[1989]",
            ifelse(variable == "q", "log(q)", param_label_parse(variable))
          ),
          levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]")
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(cv_label), !is.na(variable_label))
    div_counts <- sim_vals_all %>%
      distinct(sim_id, div_group, cv_label) %>%
      count(cv_label, div_group) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = div_group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
      mutate(
        `no_div(=0)` = if ("no_div(=0)" %in% names(.)) `no_div(=0)` else 0L,
        `has_div(>0)` = if ("has_div(>0)" %in% names(.)) `has_div(>0)` else 0L
      )

    valid_cv_labels <- div_counts %>%
      filter(`no_div(=0)` > 0, `has_div(>0)` > 0) %>%
      pull(cv_label) %>%
      as.character() %>%
      unique()
    if (length(valid_cv_labels) == 0) next

    sim_vals_all <- sim_vals_all %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels),
        variable_label = factor(as.character(variable_label), levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]"))
      )
    overall_truth_all <- overall_truth_all %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels),
        variable_label = factor(as.character(variable_label), levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]"))
      )
    div_counts <- div_counts %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels))

    count_note <- div_counts %>%
      arrange(cv_label) %>%
      transmute(
        note = sprintf(
          "%s: n0=%d, n+=%d",
          as.character(cv_label),
          `no_div(=0)`,
          `has_div(>0)`
        )
      ) %>%
      pull(note) %>%
      paste(collapse = "   |   ")

    p_div_subset <- ggplot(sim_vals_all, aes(x = value, y = after_stat(ndensity), fill = div_group)) +
      geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.55, bins = 35) +
      geom_density(
        data = overall_truth_all,
        aes(x = value, y = after_stat(scaled), group = interaction(cv_label, variable_label)),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        colour = "black",
        linewidth = 0.4,
        adjust = 1.1
      ) +
      facet_grid(
        cv_label ~ variable_label,
        scales = "free",
        labeller = labeller(variable_label = label_parsed, cv_label = label_value)
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("no_div(=0)" = "#1f78b4", "has_div(>0)" = "#e31a1c"),
        name = "Divergence group"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = gsub("_", " ", mdl, fixed = TRUE),
        x = "Simulated value",
        y = "Scaled density",
        caption = count_note
      ) +
      paper_theme() +
      theme(
        strip.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 8.5),
        plot.caption.position = "plot"
      )

    div_subset_plots[[mdl]] <- p_div_subset
  }

  if (length(div_subset_plots) == 0) {
    cat("No models had both divergence subsets: =0 and >0.\n")
  } else {
    invisible(lapply(div_subset_plots, print))
    div_dims <- grid_layout_dims(length(div_subset_plots), panel_w = 7.0, panel_h = 5.0, max_cols = 2, max_h = 20)
    save_plot_grid(
      div_subset_plots,
      filename = "sim_values_by_divergence_subset.png",
      ncol = div_dims$ncol,
      width = div_dims$width,
      height = div_dims$height
    )
    save_plot_list_panels(div_subset_plots, "sim_values_by_divergence_subset_panel", width = 9, height = 6.5)
  }
}
```



# Prior-only plots (from saved plot-data RDS)

```{r prior_only_saved_rds_plots, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (length(prior_only_rds_files) == 0) {
  cat("No prior-only plot-data RDS found in ../results/prior_only.\n")
} else {
  prior_plot_params <- paste0("Pt[", 21:23, "]")
  prior_scalar_params <- c("K", "r", "q", "sigma2", "tau2")
  prior_bundles_raw <- lapply(prior_only_rds_files, readRDS)
  bundle_has_softmax <- function(b) {
    if (is.null(b$post_long)) return(FALSE)
    any(grepl("softmax", unique(as.character(b$post_long$model))))
  }
  keep_main_prior_bundle <- !vapply(prior_bundles_raw, bundle_has_softmax, logical(1))
  if (!all(keep_main_prior_bundle)) {
    cat("Skipping softmax sensitivity bundles from the main eight-model prior-only figures: ",
        sum(!keep_main_prior_bundle), "\n")
  }
  prior_bundles_raw <- prior_bundles_raw[keep_main_prior_bundle]
  bundle_has_params <- function(b, params) {
    if (is.null(b$post_long) || is.null(b$sim_long)) return(FALSE)
    post_params <- unique(as.character(b$post_long$param))
    sim_params <- unique(as.character(b$sim_long$param))
    all(params %in% post_params) && all(params %in% sim_params)
  }
  has_prior_pt_bundle <- vapply(prior_bundles_raw, bundle_has_params, logical(1), params = prior_plot_params)
  has_prior_scalar_bundle <- vapply(prior_bundles_raw, bundle_has_params, logical(1), params = prior_scalar_params)
  if (!all(has_prior_pt_bundle)) {
    cat("Skipping prior-only bundles without Pt[21:23] for P[21:23] plot: ",
        sum(!has_prior_pt_bundle), "\n")
  }
  if (!any(has_prior_pt_bundle) && !any(has_prior_scalar_bundle)) {
    stop("No compatible prior-only plot-data bundles found. Re-run analysis/PriorOnly.R.")
  }
  pt_post_long <- if (any(has_prior_pt_bundle)) bind_rows(lapply(prior_bundles_raw[has_prior_pt_bundle], `[[`, "post_long")) else NULL
  pt_sim_long <- if (any(has_prior_pt_bundle)) bind_rows(lapply(prior_bundles_raw[has_prior_pt_bundle], `[[`, "sim_long")) else NULL
  scalar_post_long <- if (any(has_prior_scalar_bundle)) bind_rows(lapply(prior_bundles_raw[has_prior_scalar_bundle], `[[`, "post_long")) else NULL
  scalar_sim_long <- if (any(has_prior_scalar_bundle)) bind_rows(lapply(prior_bundles_raw[has_prior_scalar_bundle], `[[`, "sim_long")) else NULL
  
  if ((!is.null(pt_post_long) && !is.null(pt_sim_long) && nrow(pt_post_long) > 0 && nrow(pt_sim_long) > 0) ||
      (!is.null(scalar_post_long) && !is.null(scalar_sim_long) && nrow(scalar_post_long) > 0 && nrow(scalar_sim_long) > 0)) {
    xgrid_unit <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 512)
    dens_long_fn <- function(df, out_col, x_limits = c(0, 1), n_grid = 512) {
      parts <- split(df, list(df$model, df$param), drop = TRUE)
      out <- lapply(parts, function(dd) {
        if (nrow(dd) == 0) return(NULL)
        d <- if (is.null(x_limits)) {
          density(dd$value, n = n_grid, na.rm = TRUE)
        } else {
          density(dd$value, from = x_limits[1], to = x_limits[2], n = n_grid, na.rm = TRUE)
        }
        tmp <- data.frame(
          model = as.character(dd$model[1]),
          param = as.character(dd$param[1]),
          idx = seq_along(d$x),
          x = d$x,
          dens = d$y
        )
        names(tmp)[names(tmp) == "dens"] <- out_col
        tmp
      })
      bind_rows(out)
    }
    dens_long_fn_param_limits <- function(df, out_col, param_limits, n_grid = 512) {
      parts <- split(df, list(df$model, df$param), drop = TRUE)
      out <- lapply(parts, function(dd) {
        if (nrow(dd) == 0) return(NULL)
        p <- as.character(dd$param[1])
        lim <- param_limits[[p]]
        if (is.null(lim) || any(!is.finite(lim))) return(NULL)
        d <- density(dd$value, from = lim[1], to = lim[2], n = n_grid, na.rm = TRUE)
        tmp <- data.frame(
          model = as.character(dd$model[1]),
          param = as.character(dd$param[1]),
          idx = seq_along(d$x),
          x = d$x,
          dens = d$y
        )
        names(tmp)[names(tmp) == "dens"] <- out_col
        tmp
      })
      bind_rows(out)
    }

    build_prior_diff_plot <- function(post_df, sim_df, params, filename, title_text,
                                      panel_prefix, x_limits = c(0, 1),
                                      free_x_by_param = FALSE,
                                      aggregate_width = 14, aggregate_height = 8,
                                      panel_width = 6.5, panel_height = 4.8) {
      post_sub <- post_df %>% filter(param %in% params)
      sim_sub <- sim_df %>% filter(param %in% params)
      if (free_x_by_param && "q" %in% params) {
        post_sub <- post_sub %>%
          mutate(value = ifelse(as.character(param) == "q", log(pmax(value, .Machine$double.eps)), value))
        sim_sub <- sim_sub %>%
          mutate(value = ifelse(as.character(param) == "q", log(pmax(value, .Machine$double.eps)), value))
      }
      if (nrow(post_sub) == 0 || nrow(sim_sub) == 0) {
        stop("Prior-only plot-data RDS does not include required parameters for: ", filename)
      }
      missing_params <- setdiff(params, unique(as.character(post_sub$param)))
      if (length(missing_params) > 0) {
        stop("Prior-only plot-data missing parameter(s) for ", filename, ": ",
             paste(missing_params, collapse = ", "))
      }

      if (is.null(x_limits) && !free_x_by_param) {
        xr <- range(c(post_sub$value, sim_sub$value), na.rm = TRUE)
        if (!all(is.finite(xr))) xr <- c(0, 1)
        if (xr[1] == xr[2]) {
          pad <- ifelse(xr[1] == 0, 1, abs(xr[1]) * 0.05)
          xr <- xr + c(-pad, pad)
        } else {
          pad <- 0.03 * diff(xr)
          xr <- xr + c(-pad, pad)
        }
        x_limits <- xr
      }
      observed_models <- sort(unique(as.character(post_sub$model)))
      ct_models <- sort(unique(as.character(post_sub$model[grepl("^ct", as.character(post_sub$model))])))
      nct_models <- sort(unique(as.character(post_sub$model[grepl("^nct", as.character(post_sub$model))])))
      model_levels <- c(ct_models, nct_models)
      if (length(model_levels) == 0) {
        model_levels <- observed_models
      } else {
        model_levels <- unique(c(model_levels, observed_models))
      }
      ncol_prior <- max(1, max(length(ct_models), length(nct_models)))

      post_sub <- post_sub %>%
        mutate(
          model = factor(as.character(model), levels = model_levels),
          param = factor(as.character(param), levels = params)
        )
      sim_sub <- sim_sub %>%
        mutate(
          model = factor(as.character(model), levels = levels(post_sub$model)),
          param = factor(as.character(param), levels = levels(post_sub$param))
        )
      param_levels <- levels(post_sub$param)
      param_label_values <- param_label_parse(param_levels)
      param_label_values[param_levels == "q"] <- "log(q)"
      param_label_values[param_levels == "Pt[23]"] <- "P[1989]"

      if (free_x_by_param) {
        param_limits_tbl <- bind_rows(
          post_sub %>% transmute(param = as.character(param), value = value),
          sim_sub %>% transmute(param = as.character(param), value = value)
        ) %>%
          group_by(param) %>%
          summarise(
            lo = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
            hi = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop"
          ) %>%
          mutate(
            span = hi - lo,
            pad = ifelse(span > 0, 0.03 * span, pmax(abs(lo), 1) * 0.03),
            lo = lo - pad,
            hi = hi + pad
          )
        param_limits <- setNames(
          lapply(seq_len(nrow(param_limits_tbl)), function(i) c(param_limits_tbl$lo[i], param_limits_tbl$hi[i])),
          param_limits_tbl$param
        )
        post_den <- dens_long_fn_param_limits(
          post_sub, "dens_post", param_limits = param_limits, n_grid = length(xgrid_unit)
        )
      } else {
        post_den <- dens_long_fn(post_sub, "dens_post", x_limits = x_limits, n_grid = length(xgrid_unit))
      }

      # Truth curve should be identical across models for each parameter.
      # Build one pooled truth density per parameter, then copy it to all models.
      sim_truth_base <- sim_sub %>%
        mutate(model = "__truth__")
      truth_den_base <- if (free_x_by_param) {
        dens_long_fn_param_limits(
          sim_truth_base, "dens_truth", param_limits = param_limits, n_grid = length(xgrid_unit)
        )
      } else {
        dens_long_fn(sim_truth_base, "dens_truth", x_limits = x_limits, n_grid = length(xgrid_unit))
      }
      if (is.null(truth_den_base) || nrow(truth_den_base) == 0) {
        truth_den_base <- tibble(
          param = character(),
          idx = integer(),
          x_truth = numeric(),
          dens_truth = numeric()
        )
      } else {
        truth_den_base <- truth_den_base %>%
          transmute(
            param = as.character(param),
            idx = idx,
            x_truth = x,
            dens_truth = dens_truth
          )
      }
      truth_models <- as.character(levels(post_sub$model))
      if (length(truth_models) == 0) {
        truth_models <- sort(unique(as.character(post_sub$model)))
      }
      truth_den <- truth_den_base[rep(seq_len(nrow(truth_den_base)), each = length(truth_models)), , drop = FALSE]
      truth_den$model <- rep(truth_models, times = nrow(truth_den_base))
      truth_den <- as_tibble(truth_den) %>%
        select(model, param, idx, x_truth, dens_truth)

      den_df <- left_join(
        post_den,
        truth_den %>% select(model, param, idx, x_truth, dens_truth),
        by = c("model", "param", "idx")
      ) %>%
        mutate(
          dens_post = ifelse(is.na(dens_post), 0, dens_post),
          dens_truth = ifelse(is.na(dens_truth), 0, dens_truth),
          x_truth = ifelse(is.na(x_truth), x, x_truth),
          param = factor(param, levels = levels(post_sub$param)),
          model = factor(model, levels = levels(post_sub$model)),
          y0 = as.numeric(param)
        ) %>%
        group_by(model, param) %>%
        mutate(
          dens_post_s = dens_post / max(dens_post, na.rm = TRUE),
          dens_truth_s = dens_truth / max(dens_truth, na.rm = TRUE)
        ) %>%
        ungroup() %>%
        mutate(
          y_post = y0 + 0.85 * dens_post_s,
          y_truth = y0 + 0.85 * dens_truth_s,
          ymin = pmin(y_post, y_truth),
          ymax = pmax(y_post, y_truth),
          diff_dir = ifelse(dens_post_s >= dens_truth_s, "post_gt_truth", "truth_gt_post"),
          diff_dir = factor(
            diff_dir,
            levels = c("post_gt_truth", "truth_gt_post"),
            labels = c("Realised prior > Truth", "Truth > Realised prior")
          )
        ) %>%
        group_by(model, param) %>%
        mutate(
          diff_run = cumsum(diff_dir != dplyr::lag(diff_dir, default = first(diff_dir)))
        ) %>%
        ungroup()

      diff_palette <- c(
        "Realised prior > Truth" = "#0B57A3",
        "Truth > Realised prior" = "#D04A02"
      )
      post_line_colour <- "#3A3A3A"
      truth_line_colour <- "#B80F0A"

      if (free_x_by_param) {
        den_df <- den_df %>%
          mutate(
            param_label = factor(
              ifelse(
                as.character(param) == "q",
                "log(q)",
                format_parameter_label_plotmath(as.character(param))
              ),
              levels = param_label_values
            )
          )

        p_agg <- ggplot() +
          geom_ribbon(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, ymin = 0, ymax = dens_post_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
            fill = "grey70",
            alpha = 0.14,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_ribbon(
            data = den_df,
            aes(
              x = x,
              ymin = pmin(dens_post_s, dens_truth_s),
              ymax = pmax(dens_post_s, dens_truth_s),
              fill = diff_dir,
              group = interaction(model, param, diff_run)
            ),
            alpha = 0.82,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_line(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, y = dens_post_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
            colour = post_line_colour,
            linewidth = 0.35,
            alpha = 0.75
          ) +
          geom_line(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x_truth, y = dens_truth_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
            colour = truth_line_colour,
            linewidth = 0.28,
            alpha = 0.75
          ) +
          facet_grid(
            model ~ param_label,
            scales = "free_x",
            labeller = labeller(param_label = label_parsed)
          ) +
          scale_fill_manual(
            values = diff_palette,
            name = "Difference"
          ) +
          labs(title = title_text, x = "Value", y = "Scaled density") +
          theme_bw() +
          theme(
            strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 0),
            strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
            legend.position = "bottom"
          )
      } else {
        p_agg <- ggplot() +
          geom_ribbon(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, ymin = y0, ymax = y_post, group = interaction(model, param)),
            fill = "grey70",
            alpha = 0.14,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_ribbon(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = diff_dir, group = interaction(model, param, diff_run)),
            alpha = 0.82,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_line(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, y = y_post, group = interaction(model, param)),
            colour = post_line_colour,
            linewidth = 0.35,
            alpha = 0.75
          ) +
          geom_line(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, y = y_truth, group = interaction(model, param)),
            colour = truth_line_colour,
            linewidth = 0.28,
            alpha = 0.75
          ) +
          facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free_x", nrow = 2, ncol = ncol_prior) +
          scale_fill_manual(
            values = diff_palette,
            name = "Difference"
          ) +
          scale_y_continuous(
            breaks = seq_along(levels(post_sub$param)),
            labels = parse(text = param_label_values)
          ) +
          coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits) +
          labs(title = title_text, x = "Value", y = NULL) +
          theme_bw() +
          theme(legend.position = "bottom")
      }

      print(p_agg)
      save_manuscript_plot(p_agg, filename, width = aggregate_width, height = aggregate_height)

      prior_model_levels <- levels(post_sub$model)
      prior_model_levels <- prior_model_levels[prior_model_levels %in% unique(as.character(post_sub$model))]
      for (mdl in prior_model_levels) {
        den_dd <- dplyr::filter(den_df, model == mdl)
        if (nrow(den_dd) == 0) next
        if (free_x_by_param) {
          den_dd <- den_dd %>%
            mutate(
              param_label = factor(
                ifelse(
                  as.character(param) == "q",
                  "log(q)",
                  format_parameter_label_plotmath(as.character(param))
                ),
                levels = param_label_values
              )
            )
          p_panel <- ggplot() +
            geom_ribbon(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, ymin = 0, ymax = dens_post_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
              fill = "grey70",
              alpha = 0.14,
              colour = NA
            ) +
            geom_ribbon(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(
                x = x,
                ymin = pmin(dens_post_s, dens_truth_s),
                ymax = pmax(dens_post_s, dens_truth_s),
                fill = diff_dir,
                group = interaction(model, param, diff_run)
              ),
              alpha = 0.82,
              colour = NA
            ) +
            geom_line(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, y = dens_post_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
              colour = post_line_colour,
              linewidth = 0.35,
              alpha = 0.75
            ) +
            geom_line(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x_truth, y = dens_truth_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
              colour = truth_line_colour,
              linewidth = 0.28,
              alpha = 0.75
            ) +
            facet_wrap(~ param_label, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3,
                       labeller = labeller(param_label = label_parsed)) +
            scale_fill_manual(values = diff_palette, guide = "none") +
            labs(x = "Value", y = "Scaled density", subtitle = as.character(mdl)) +
            theme_bw() +
            theme(plot.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")
        } else {
          p_panel <- ggplot() +
            geom_ribbon(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, ymin = y0, ymax = y_post, group = interaction(model, param)),
              fill = "grey70",
              alpha = 0.14,
              colour = NA
            ) +
            geom_ribbon(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = diff_dir, group = interaction(model, param, diff_run)),
              alpha = 0.82,
              colour = NA
            ) +
            geom_line(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, y = y_post, group = interaction(model, param)),
              colour = post_line_colour,
              linewidth = 0.35,
              alpha = 0.75
            ) +
            geom_line(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, y = y_truth, group = interaction(model, param)),
              colour = truth_line_colour,
              linewidth = 0.28,
              alpha = 0.75
            ) +
            scale_fill_manual(values = diff_palette, guide = "none") +
            scale_y_continuous(
              breaks = seq_along(levels(post_sub$param)),
              labels = parse(text = param_label_values)
            ) +
            coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits) +
            labs(x = "Value", y = NULL, subtitle = as.character(mdl)) +
            theme_bw() +
            theme(plot.title = element_blank())
        }
        save_manuscript_plot(
          p_panel,
          sprintf("%s__%s.png", panel_prefix, panel_slug(mdl)),
          width = panel_width,
          height = panel_height
        )
      }
    }

    if (!is.null(pt_post_long) && !is.null(pt_sim_long) && nrow(pt_post_long) > 0 && nrow(pt_sim_long) > 0) {
      build_prior_diff_plot(
        post_df = pt_post_long,
        sim_df = pt_sim_long,
        params = prior_plot_params,
        filename = "prior_only_ridge_difference.png",
        title_text = "Prior-only: P[1987:1989] realised prior vs truth",
        panel_prefix = "prior_only_ridge_difference_panel",
        x_limits = c(0, 1),
        aggregate_width = 14,
        aggregate_height = 9.5,
        panel_width = 8.0,
        panel_height = 4.8
      )
    } else {
      cat("Skipping prior-only P[21:23] difference plot; required parameters not present in saved RDS.\n")
    }

    if (!is.null(scalar_post_long) && !is.null(scalar_sim_long) &&
        all(prior_scalar_params %in% unique(as.character(scalar_post_long$param))) &&
        all(prior_scalar_params %in% unique(as.character(scalar_sim_long$param)))) {
      build_prior_diff_plot(
        post_df = scalar_post_long,
        sim_df = scalar_sim_long,
        params = prior_scalar_params,
        filename = "prior_only_parameter_difference.png",
        title_text = "Prior-only: K, r, q, sigma2, tau2 realised prior vs truth",
        panel_prefix = "prior_only_parameter_difference_panel",
        x_limits = NULL,
        free_x_by_param = TRUE,
        aggregate_width = 16,
        aggregate_height = 10.5,
        panel_width = 8.0,
        panel_height = 6.5
      )
    } else {
      cat("Skipping prior-only scalar-parameter difference plot; required parameters not present in saved RDS.\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("Prior-only plot-data RDS found, but required objects are missing.\n")
  }
}
```

# AlbacoreFits plots (from saved plot-data RDS)

```{r albacorefits_saved_rds_plots, echo=FALSE, message=F, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (length(albacore_rds_files) == 0) {
  cat("No AlbacoreFits plot-data RDS found in ../results/albacore_fits.\n")
} else {
  alb_bundles <- lapply(albacore_rds_files, readRDS)
  bt_long_all <- bind_rows(lapply(alb_bundles, `[[`, "bt_long_all"))
  param_long_all <- bind_rows(lapply(alb_bundles, `[[`, "param_long_all"))
  
  albacore_scenario_label <- function(x) {
    x_chr <- as.character(x)
    out <- dplyr::case_when(
      grepl("^tau2Prior\\[3\\]=0", x_chr) ~ "Prior predictive distribution",
      grepl("^tau2Prior\\[3\\]=1", x_chr) ~ "Posterior distribution",
      x_chr %in% c("0", "tau0") ~ "Prior predictive distribution",
      x_chr %in% c("1", "tau1") ~ "Posterior distribution",
      TRUE ~ x_chr
    )
    factor(out, levels = c(
      "Prior predictive distribution",
      "Posterior distribution"
    ))
  }
  
  if (!is.null(bt_long_all) && nrow(bt_long_all) > 0) {
    bt_long_all <- bt_long_all %>%
      filter(time <= ntimes) %>%
      mutate(
        scenario_label = albacore_scenario_label(scenario),
        year = factor(years[time], levels = years)
      )
    bt_single_var <- length(unique(as.character(bt_long_all$var))) == 1

    p_alb_bt <- ggplot(bt_long_all, aes(x = year, y = value, fill = model)) +
        geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7, outlier.size = 0.35) +
        {
          if (bt_single_var) {
            facet_grid(scenario_label ~ ., scales = "free_y")
          } else {
            facet_grid(scenario_label ~ var, scales = "free_y")
          }
        } +
        labs(title = "AlbacoreFits biomass states", x = "Year", y = "Biomass (MT)") +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(
          legend.position = "bottom",
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
          strip.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
          strip.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
        )
    print(p_alb_bt)
    save_manuscript_plot(p_alb_bt, "albacore_biomass_states.png", width = 8.0, height = 10.5)

    bt_models <- sort(unique(as.character(bt_long_all$model)))
    for (mdl in bt_models) {
      dd <- dplyr::filter(bt_long_all, model == mdl)
      if (nrow(dd) == 0) next
      dd_single_var <- length(unique(as.character(dd$var))) == 1
      p_bt_panel <- ggplot(dd, aes(x = year, y = value, fill = model)) +
        geom_boxplot(width = 0.7, outlier.size = 0.35) +
        {
          if (dd_single_var) {
            facet_grid(scenario_label ~ ., scales = "free_y")
          } else {
            facet_grid(scenario_label ~ var, scales = "free_y")
          }
        } +
        labs(x = "Year", y = "Biomass (MT)", subtitle = mdl) +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(
          legend.position = "none",
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
          plot.title = element_blank(),
          strip.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
          strip.text.x = element_text(size = 8)
        )
      save_manuscript_plot(
        p_bt_panel,
        sprintf("albacore_biomass_states_panel__%s.png", panel_slug(mdl)),
        width = 6.5,
        height = 8.5
      )
    }
  } else {
    cat("AlbacoreFits biomass plot data is missing or empty.\n")
  }
  
}
```
